login.title: Studiq
login.studentSubtext: Sign in to view your lessons
login.registered: Account created successfully! Sign in with your email and password.
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up and wait for teacher approval.
login.wrongRoleStudent: This account is not a student account.
login.wrongRoleTeacher: This account is not a teacher account.
pending.title: Account created — awaiting teacher approval
pending.body: Your teacher will get a notification and approve the account soon. This page will update automatically once approved.
register.noInviteHint: No invite code? You can still register — a teacher will approve manually.
register.courseLabel: Which course are you here for?
register.courseHint: Your learning map will be ready as soon as the teacher approves you
register.signupNotePlaceholder: Which platform did you find us on? Anything the teacher should know before your first lesson: current level, learning goals, topics you struggle with, or any other relevant context.
register.pendingSubmitted: Request submitted — your teacher will approve soon
approvals.title: Student approvals
approvals.confirmReject: Reject this request? The user will not be able to log in.
login.rejected: Account was not approved. Contact the teacher if this looks wrong.
login.wrongPasswordBody: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
register.title: Studiq
register.welcomeStudent: Welcome, {name}! Choose an email and password to create your student account.
callback.title: Studiq
setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
teacher.inviteCreated: Invite created for {name}! Share this link — the student will set their own email and password.
teacher.noStudents: No students yet. Invite your first student above.
teacher.noStudentsBody: Start by adding a course you teach. Students will then be able to sign up and pick your course.
teacher.deleteWarning: This will remove all their data permanently.
student.firstLesson: Your first lesson is being prepared
student.firstLessonSub: Start with the learning map to see where you stand, or book a lesson with your teacher.
student.reflectionHint: Your feedback is shared with your teacher — tell them what was easy, what was hard, and where you need more help.
student.reflectionSubmittedBody: Your teacher will read it and follow up with feedback or your next lesson.
onboarding.subtitle: Choose the topics you want to study. Your AI tutor will use these to create your first personalized lesson.
lessons.notFoundHint: It may have been deleted, or the link is invalid. Head back to your learning map.
reports.empty: Your first progress report will appear here after your teacher generates it.
reports.noReports: No reports yet. Generate one to see how this student is progressing.
studentDetail.feedbackPlaceholder: Write feedback for the digital teacher to steer the next lessons.
studentDetail.feedbackNote: Feedback will be included in the next generated lesson.
studentDetail.confirmDeleteLesson: Delete this lesson permanently? This cannot be undone.
studentDetail.deleteFailed: Deletion failed. Try logging out and back in.
feedback.title: AI Feedback History
feedback.subtitle: Feedback you have given to the AI tutor. Incorporated feedback shapes the next generated lesson.
feedback.empty: No feedback submitted yet. Go to a student page to send feedback to the AI.
teacher.noSlots: No availability slots set. Add your available hours so students can book lessons.
student.noSlots: Your teacher has not set available hours yet.
student.addNote: Add a note for your teacher (optional)
booking.pickDateFirst: Pick a date on the calendar
booking.noSlotsForDate: No open times for this date
booking.calendarHint: You can pick multiple hours (even across days) before sending
booking.capReached: You can pick up to {max} slots at a time
approvals.studentRequestedCancel: Student requested to cancel this lesson
teacher.scheduleHint: Pick dates and add the times you're available
teacher.activeDatesHint: Highlighted days = you have open times
teacher.noSlotsForDate: No times yet for this date. Add one below.
teacher.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time
teacher.pickDateFirst: Pick a date on the calendar to add times
teacher.confirmCancelLesson: Cancel this lesson? This cannot be undone.
forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.sent: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
forgot.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
createLesson.title: Create Lesson
upload.invalidType: Only PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP files allowed
courses.empty: No courses yet. Create a course to map out your syllabus.
courses.name: Course name
studentMap.setExamDate: Set exam date for this student
studentMap.clearOverrideHint: Removes the per-student override; falls back to the course's exam date
courses.examDateHint: Students see a countdown on their learning map, and topics get danger badges as the date approaches.
courses.deleteConfirm: Delete course "{name}"? Linked lessons stay but lose their course tag.
courses.topicPlaceholder: Add a topic and press Enter
courses.addParentPlaceholder: Add a main topic (e.g. Limits) and press Enter
courses.noTopics: No topics yet. Add the syllabus topics above.
courses.sharedHint: Shared = taught to every student in this course. Unique = tailored to a specific student.
createLesson.titleAutoHint: Auto-filled from the topic. Edit to override.
map.title: Learning Map
map.mySubtitle: Your path, progress on each topic, and what's next
map.studentEmpty: No active path yet. Once you receive lessons, your map will appear here.
map.createLessonOnTopic: Create a lesson on this topic
map.noTopics: No topics in this path yet
map.noLessonsTeacher: No lessons created on this topic yet
map.lockedHint: Complete the previous topic to unlock
briefing.title: Pre-session briefing
briefing.subtitle: What to know before the next session
briefing.subtitleWithName: What to know before the next session with {name}
studentDetail.reflectionEmpty: The student hasn't written any feedback yet.
student.solutionHint: Upload a PDF or image with your solution. Your teacher will be able to see it.
studentDetail.solutionEmpty: The student hasn't uploaded a solution yet.
profile.title: Profile settings
profile.subtitle: Update your name, email, or password
profile.currentPasswordHint: Required to change email or password
profile.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Leave empty to keep current.
lessonReview.title: Review student's solution
lessonReview.repeatHint: Student isn't ready yet — more practice at this level
lessonReview.nextLevelHint: Move from base to medium, or medium to exam
lessonReview.nextTopicHint: Student mastered this — advance in the syllabus
lessonReview.noteHint: What did you see in the solution? The system learns your standards over time.
lessonReview.notePlaceholder: e.g. 'Answer was right but reasoning was unclear on Q3'
studentContext.backgroundHint: Static context — special needs, family background, personality. Written once, edited only when life circumstances change.
studentContext.backgroundPlaceholder: e.g. 'Student has dyslexia — struggles with long reading. Family is very supportive, pressure to succeed. Anxious in exams.'
studentContext.insightsHint: Insights you discover while teaching. Each insight is saved with a date — the system learns over time.
studentContext.insightPlaceholder: One short insight — e.g. 'Diagrams help with abstract concepts'
studentContext.insightsEmpty: No insights yet. Add your first one when you discover something that helps this student.
teacher.gcalConnectedBanner: Google Calendar connected! Approved lessons will automatically create calendar events and send students an invite.
teacher.gcalErrorBanner: Could not connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
